title: lithospermum purpureocoeruleum
intro: Lithospermum purpureocoeruleum, also known as Perennial Gromwell or Chinese Gromwell, is a plant species belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects, which are attributed to its rich content of lithospermic acid. The health benefits of Lithospermum purpureocoeruleum include its potential to improve cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Lithospermum purpureocoeruleum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, as well as used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions.
